text:
Once upon a time, there was a little cat named Felix.

Felix lived in a cozy little house at the edge of the forest.

Every day, he stretched outside and meowed happily at the wildflowers that bloomed next to the path.

One day, Felix accidentally bumped into a mysterious old owl perched on a branch.

The owl had bright eyes and a voice as soft as midnight.

"Why do you keep nibbling on those lovely purple petals?" whispered the owl.

Felix replied, "Oh just feeding my little belly. I hardly dare to sing."

The owl blinked sleepily; he had lost track of time.

Then, the owl said something unexpected, "You have such a sweet voice. Why don't you sing for me?"

Felix thought for a moment.

Why not? I'm just a tiny cat.

He closed his eyes, took a deep breath, and began a soft melody.

The owl perched nearby, closed her eyelids, hummed along, then
